## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 14 / Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Flowtrack version / commit: [e.g. 3825a8e]
- AI provider used: [e.g. Ollama / OpenAI / none]

## Logs

Paste relevant log output (remove any sensitive data):

```
~/.focusaudit/dashboard.log
~/.focusaudit/tracker.log
```

## Screenshots (optional)

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.
